title: Lakebase will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile
body:
On or after April 30, 2026, Lakebase will be enabled by default for workspaces with the compliance security profile when the compliance standard is set to HIPAA, C5, TISAX, or None.

See [Lakebase compliance](/aws/en/oltp/projects/data-protection#compliance).
